prose:
Fukui reactivity descriptors computed for aniline using DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, PySCF). Condnsed Fukui indices were calculated from Mulliken atomic charges of the neutral, cationic (N⁺¹, doublet), and anionic (N⁻¹, doublet) species. Most electrophilic site: ortho carbon (atom 3, C), f⁺ = +2.30. Most nucleophilic site: amino nitrogen (atom 1, N), f⁻ = +0.20. Full per-atom Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, dual descriptor) listed in the result. SCF converged for all three electronic states; charge conservation checks passed (sum f⁺ = 1.0000, sum f⁻ = 1.0000). No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy.</prose>
